input.background: For each of the following comparisons, plot the data as back-to-back stemplots on a common stem. Then, compare group locations and spreads.
input.question: (c) Comparison C: Group 1: 90, 70, 50, 30; Group 2: 90, 80, 70, 60. Plot the data as back-to-back stemplots and compare group locations and spreads.

output.answer:
Comparison C. Group 1 has a lower average and greater spread.

Group 1 | | Group 2

$$
\begin{aligned}
0 & |1| \
& |2| \
0 & |3|  \
& |4|  \
0 & |5| 0 \
& |6| 0 \
0 & |7| 0 \
& |8| 0 \
0 & |9| 0 \
& \times 10
\end{aligned}
$$
